title: Kenyan Bitter Date Crumble
description: A traditional Kenyan dessert featuring bitter dates and a crumbly topping.
instructions: Peel the bitter dates and cut them into halves.
In a bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and cold butter. Use a pastry blender or your fingertips to work the butter into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Add the Kenyan crumble to the flour mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with the bitter dates.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the dates are tender.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Optional: Serve with a scoop of vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
